# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

FROM base_image_name

# Set working directory inside the container
WORKDIR /app

# Create the uploads directory if it doesn't exist
RUN mkdir -p /uploads

# Copy any initial necessary files or scripts to the container (if needed)
COPY initial_files/ ./

# Command to process files from the /uploads directory
CMD ["sh", "-c", "for file in /uploads/*; do process_command $file; done"]
